summary: A phone interview on The Glenn Beck Program with Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons. He calls Gov. Newsom's anti-ICE comments 'disgusting' and 'totally wrong,' and a brief Colbert/Newsom Late Show clip is referenced. The segment is a talk-show interview with no music.
notable_text: THE GLENN BECK PROGRAM; 'On the Phone - Todd Lyons'; 'The Late Show with Stephen Colbert | CBS'
